_meta.description: Canonical n8n workflow ID manifest for this store-os instance.
_meta.purpose: Used by scripts/deploy-workflow.js to substitute REPLACE_WITH_* placeholders before deploying repo workflow JSON to n8n.
_meta.instance: n8n Cloud — Claude - Code & GPT - Shopify Webbuilder Workflow
_meta.warning: These IDs are instance-specific. Do not use for a different n8n instance without updating all values.

credential_placeholders._note: Credential IDs are instance-specific and must be set manually in n8n. These placeholders appear in subworkflow JSON files and require the numeric credential ID from n8n Settings > Credentials (visible in the URL when editing a credential).

REPLACE_WITH_N8N_SHOPIFY_CREDENTIAL_ID.value: NOT_YET_RECORDED — find in n8n Settings > Credentials > Shopify SuppliedTech Admin URL
REPLACE_WITH_N8N_SHOPIFY_CREDENTIAL_ID.note: import-shopify-data uses the older shopifyApi credential type. build-shopify-catalog uses shopifyOAuth2Api (edgLmgVntFGX6QYN) — no placeholder needed.

STORE_OS_SHOPIFY_OAUTH2_CREDENTIAL_ID.note: Hardcoded in build-shopify-catalog.n8n.json. Replace if deploying to a different n8n instance.

build-brand-positioning.note: eUXnAlZ0gmv6qOhL is the confirmed canonical workflow. AVoZ30VqPvmIYJUq is a deprecated duplicate and should not be used.
